scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Embedding models, semantic or sparse search, reranking, vector or graph RAG, retrieval training, corpus indexing, RAG pipelines, vector database clients, and retrieval evaluation.
scenarios.role: Use Sentence Transformers for dense embeddings, semantic search, CrossEncoder reranking, SparseEncoder search, evaluation/training planning, and ONNX/OpenVINO backend optimization. Routes natural language tasks to focused.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `sentence-transformers` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: backend export optimization, embeddings and similarity, evaluation and training, reranking cross encoder, retrieval and utilities, and sparse encoder search.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `sentence-transformers` when the request names `sentence-transformers`, centers on dense embeddings, semantic search, CrossEncoder reranking, SparseEncoder search, evaluation/training planning, and ONNX/OpenVINO backend optimization. Routes natural language tasks to focused sub-skills with bundled references and safe helper scripts, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in embedding retrieval rag workflows. Then route to backend export optimization, embeddings and similarity, evaluation and training, or reranking cross encoder when those focused workflows match.

scenarios.title: LLM Fine-Tuning, Training, and Serving Workflows
